name: Next Day Broccoli and Scrambled Eggs
recipeIngredient: cooked leftover broccoli (reheat in microwave or double boiler)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the toast at the bottom of a deep bowl.
2. Reheat the broccoli in the microwave or using a double boiler.
3. Heat the butter in a skillet until it turns golden brown.
4. Scramble the eggs in the skillet until they are almost fully cooked but not quite set.
5. Remove the eggs from heat and continue to stir them until they cook through completely, seasoning with salt and Tabasco sauce to taste.
6. Spoon the eggs over the toast and arrange the broccoli in the center before enjoying!
